evals.name: ai-slop-readme
evals.prompt: Dehumanize the README at dehumanizer-workspace/inputs/ai-readme.md. Write the rewritten version to the output directory as ai-readme.md.
evals.expected_output: Cleaned README: oaicite/turn0search0 markup artifacts deleted, signposting and fragmented header removed, persuasive-authority trope and challenges section cut, inline-header bold list and emojis converted, em-dash closer and tailing negation fixed, meaning preserved, register still a README.

evals.name: changelog-em-dash-hyphens
evals.prompt: Dehumanize the changelog at dehumanizer-workspace/inputs/changelog.md. Write the rewritten version to the output directory as changelog.md.
evals.expected_output: Em-dash sales closers removed (two plain sentences or restructured), hyphen-pair buzzwords reduced/varied without producing ungrammatical de-hyphenated phrases like 'cross functional', changelog still reads as a changelog with concrete entries.

evals.name: human-performative-blog
evals.prompt: Dehumanize the blog intro at dehumanizer-workspace/inputs/blog-intro.md. Write the rewritten version to the output directory as blog-intro.md.
evals.expected_output: Light touch: this is competent human writing with a real voice. It should NOT be sterilized into encyclopedia copy, the first-person voice and the 'embarrassing' admission should survive, hyphenated pairs like 'real-time' and 'cross-functional' should NOT be blanket de-hyphenated into bad grammar. Minimal or no changes is an acceptable outcome.
